summary: Complete testing of 3 new GoSocial features: Team Collaboration (Activity Log & Performance Dashboard), LinkedIn Integration, and Voice Messaging in CRM. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed for all 3 features.

issues: Console warning about empty string passed to src attribute for avatar images - minor, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: - GET /api/activity/log returns activities array with total count
- GET /api/activity/log with limit parameter works correctly
- Member data structure correct (id, name, email, role, stats)
- Stats structure correct (leads_handled, conversations, messages_sent, activities, deals_closed)
- LinkedIn conversation structure correct (id, contact_name, contact_handle, etc.)
- Voice message with audio_url created successfully
- Voice message updates conversation's last_message field
- Voice message appears in conversation messages
- Voice message to nonexistent conversation returns 404
- Voice message with zero duration is allowed
- Regular text messages work alongside voice messages
- Team page loads with 3 tabs (Members, Activity Log, Performance)
- Members tab shows role cards (Admin, Manager, Agent) and team members table
- Activity Log tab shows 'No activity logged yet' (expected - not integrated yet)
- Activity filter dropdown present and functional
- Performance tab shows member stats cards with correct metrics
- LinkedIn integration card visible in Overview tab
- LinkedIn chat view works with message history
- LinkedIn message sending works with simulated reply
- Mic button visible in chat input area
- Voice recorder UI opens when mic clicked
- Recording indicator with timer and waveform visible
- Voice messages displayed in thread with play button and duration
- Multiple voice messages visible in conversation (7 voice messages found)
critical_code_review_comments: Activity log_activity() helper exists but not integrated into other routes yet - expected behavior per agent context
Voice recording is UI-simulated (no actual audio capture) - MOCKED as expected
LinkedIn/WhatsApp/Instagram integrations are all SIMULATED - MOCKED as expected
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Voice message playback UI properly shows play/pause with progress bar
Team Performance correctly aggregates stats from leads, conversations, messages, and activity_log collections
seed_data_creation: LinkedIn demo conversations seeded via POST /api/integrations/linkedin/seed-demo
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features are fully working: 1) Team page has Members/Activity Log/Performance tabs - Activity Log shows empty message as log_activity isn't called from routes yet; Performance shows real stats from DB. 2) LinkedIn integration works identically to WhatsApp/Instagram with simulated replies. 3) Voice messaging in CRM works - mic button shows recorder UI, voice messages display with play/pause and duration. Previous iterations tested Autopilot (iter 7), theme switching (iter 8) - all passed.

mocked_apis.Voice Recording: UI SIMULATED - no actual audio capture, tracks duration only

team_collaboration.activity_log_api: WORKING - returns empty as expected (not integrated yet)
team_collaboration.team_performance_api: WORKING - returns member stats from DB
team_collaboration.activity_log_ui: WORKING - shows empty state with filter
team_collaboration.performance_ui: WORKING - shows member cards with stats
